monitors.name: databaes.net
monitors.notes: Primary public front door. If this fails, treat it as an internet-reachability incident.

monitors.name: signup.databaes.net
monitors.notes: Anonymous public page with separate deploy path from the landing page.

monitors.name: auth.databaes.net
monitors.notes: SSO front door. Critical because it gates most protected apps.

monitors.name: ops.databaes.net
monitors.notes: SSO-protected shell with a dedicated Traefik-exempt /health endpoint.

monitors.name: ops identity
monitors.notes: Exact public synthetic-only path rewritten by Traefik to the identity service's /healthz endpoint.

monitors.name: ops cmdb
monitors.notes: Exact public synthetic-only path rewritten by Traefik to the CMDB service's /healthz endpoint.

monitors.name: ops audit
monitors.notes: Exact public synthetic-only path rewritten by Traefik to the audit service's /healthz endpoint.

monitors.name: ops domain
monitors.notes: Exact public synthetic-only path rewritten by Traefik to the domain service's /healthz endpoint.

monitors.name: ops incidents
monitors.notes: Exact public synthetic-only path rewritten by Traefik to the incidents service's /healthz endpoint.

monitors.name: ops infrastructure
monitors.notes: Exact public synthetic-only path rewritten by Traefik to the infrastructure service's /healthz endpoint.

monitors.name: ops deployments
monitors.notes: Exact public synthetic-only path rewritten by Traefik to the deployments service's /healthz endpoint.

monitors.name: wikijs.databaes.net
monitors.notes: Deferred until Wiki.js exposes a stable public readiness endpoint; the Authentik bypass is in place but the backend path currently returns 404.

monitors.name: grafana.databaes.net
monitors.notes: Grafana exposes /api/health without Authentik in prod.

monitors.name: tomajflix.app
monitors.notes: Streambox already serves /api/health; Traefik only needs to exempt that path from Authentik.

monitors.name: ops-dev.databaes.net
monitors.notes: Dev ops shell with a dedicated Traefik-exempt /health endpoint.

monitors.name: ops identity
monitors.notes: Dev synthetic-only path rewritten by Traefik to the identity service's /healthz endpoint.

monitors.name: ops cmdb
monitors.notes: Dev synthetic-only path rewritten by Traefik to the CMDB service's /healthz endpoint.

monitors.name: ops audit
monitors.notes: Dev synthetic-only path rewritten by Traefik to the audit service's /healthz endpoint.

monitors.notes: Dev synthetic-only path rewritten by Traefik to the domain service's /healthz endpoint.

monitors.name: dev.tomajflix.app
monitors.notes: Dev Tomaj Flix health endpoint exposed via a narrow Traefik exemption.
